tool_calls.result:
<skill_content name="stata-aei">
# Skill: stata-aei

# Stata AEI Analysis

## Overview

Write Stata .do files to analyze the Anthropic Economic Index dataset. All analysis code goes in `code/`. Data lives in `data/raw/`.

## Project Structure

```
aei-project/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ code/           # Stata .do files go here
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ data/
‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ raw/        # Source data (do not modify)
‚îÇ       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dim/    # Dimension tables
‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ fct/    # Fact tables
```

## Data Layout

### Dimension Tables (`data/raw/dim/`)

| File | Key | Description |
|------|-----|-------------|
| `task.csv` | `task_id` | 3,395 O*NET task statements |
| `dwa.csv` | `dwa_id` | 2,087 Detailed Work Activities |
| `iwa.csv` | `iwa_id` | 332 Intermediate Work Activities |
| `element.csv` | `element_id` | 37 content-model elements |
| `geo.csv` | `geo_id` | 1,435 geographies (country/country-state) |
| `iwa_btos_crosswalk.csv` | `iwa_id` | IWA-to-BTOS category mapping |
| `task_unmatched.csv` | ‚Äî | 247 unmatched AEI task texts |

### Fact Tables (`data/raw/fct/`)

| File | Grain | Rows |
|------|-------|------|
| `request_detail.csv` | (date, source, task) | 5,176 |
| `request_geo.csv` | (geo_id, date, task) | 13,867 |
| `iwa_detail.csv` | (date, iwa_id) | 332 |
| `element_detail.csv` | (date, element_id) | 37 |
| `btos_detail.csv` | (btos_id) | 10 |

### Key Variables

**Shared keys**: `date_start`, `date_end`, `source` (claude/api), `task` (= `task_id`), `geo_id`

**request_detail columns**: `n_requests`, `pct_successful`, `input_tokens`, `output_tokens`, `cost`, `human_time`, `ai_time`

**request_geo columns**: `n_requests` only (no success/token/time breakdowns by geography)

## Writing Stata Code

- One `.do` file per analysis task in `code/`
- Use descriptive filenames: `explore_tasks.do`, `geo_analysis.do`
- Load data with relative paths: `"../data/raw/fct/request_geo.csv"`
- Use `import delimited` for CSVs
- Document key assumptions in comments at top of each .do file

## Common Patterns

```stata
* Load fa

messages.content:
Load data with `import delimited` from `data/raw/`. Dimension tables (tasks, geographies, elements) are in `data/raw/dim/`, fact tables (requests, tokens, costs) in `data/raw/fct/`.

Key workflow:
1. Load fact table ‚Üí merge with dimensions on shared keys (`task`, `geo_id`, `date_start`)
2. Use `collapse` for aggregations (by country, task, time)
3. Filter by `source` (claude/api) ‚Äî note `pct_successful` and token/cost indices are NULL for claude

Start with an exploration script like `code/explore_tasks.do` to get familiar with the data.
